text.headline: Kehan Dong - Founder Chronicle
text.text: A timeline of entrepreneurship, education, investing, and founder support.

text.headline: Early Educational Formation
text.text: Educational foundation that shaped understanding of early capability discovery.

text.headline: Inner Journey Founded
text.text: Founded Inner Journey, a transformational program for founders and leaders focused on conscious growth and inner alignment.

text.headline: Code of Love NGO Founded
text.text: Founded Code of Love, an NGO focused on social impact and educational initiatives.

text.headline: Angel Investing Activity
text.text: Active angel investor supporting early-stage founders, unconventional paths, and long-term agency.

text.headline: Startup Go Camp at Duke Kunshan University
text.text: Co-founded and taught SGC, a 6-week intensive entrepreneurial course achieving 90.4/100 student rating. Collaborated with DKU Innovation and Entrepreneurship Initiative.

text.headline: SGC Course Completion and Impact
text.text: First SGC cohort completed with 90.4/100 rating. Many students continued building their entrepreneurial projects, with strong freshman participation indicating early entrepreneurial engagement.

text.headline: Current Focus: Integrated Systems
text.text: Building systems around early founders, education, and long-term agency through investing, writing, and program development.
